name: @games-coder/hodeuscli-pods
description: Premium CLI tool for managing vLLM deployments on GPU pods

scripts.build: tsgo -p tsconfig.build.json && shx chmod +x dist/cli.js && shx cp src/models.json dist/ && shx cp -r scripts dist/
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build

author: Games-coder
